Works & handover

Start a project pack

Pick a starting point. Everything you mark up feeds the plans, calcs and exports.

Or drop files anywhere on this canvas · iPhone HEIC photos are pulled out automatically · PDF pages become plans

Projects on this device

Every job saved on this device, newest first, with status at a glance: outcome, open snags and how export-ready the pack is. Quotes, RAMS and support requests linked to a job appear beneath it. Files (Save) are still your durable copies.

Job programme

Phases suggested from the marked-up quantities, run one after another over working days (Mon to Fri). Adjust durations, drop phases that don't apply, then save the PDF.

DNO connection application

The data an ENA connection application (or chargepoint notification) asks for, compiled live from this pack. Fill anything marked missing in Job details / Branding, then copy it into the online form.

Cable calculations

Every sized run gets the single-circuit check: Ib ≤ In ≤ Iz with derating factors, volt drop, earth-fault loop (Zs) and CPC adiabatic. Changes save onto each run and print on the calc sheet.

Draft check to the BS 7671 method using typical manufacturer-published ratings (v0.9, pending specialist sign-off). Assumes MCB/RCBO disconnection in 0.1 s, 20 °C soil, standard soil resistivity. A sizing aid, not a design certificate: verify against BS 7671 / the datasheet before construction.

Single-line diagram

Schematic of the supply → distribution → charger arrangement, drawn from the plan markup. Snapped cable runs carry their spec and measured length; dashed legs are inferred and still to be routed.

Included in the engineer pack PDF

3D showroom

Every charger and piece of site kit as a true 3D model · chargers follow the pack's colour & design settings

Drag to spin · scroll or pinch to zoom · right-drag to move · double-click to re-centre
Loading the 3D engine…

Charging-day simulator

A day on this supply: background load plus car charging, in 15-minute steps. Drag the sliders; the curve, peak and finish time update live.

Modelled at 230 V per phase · DLM floor 6 A · no diversity on charging

Earthing & protection wizard

Three questions → a documented earthing decision. It fills the earthing field in Job details, ticks the matching compliance items and prints the rationale in the engineer PDF. Written to BS 7671:2018+A4:2026.

Materials list

Wholesaler-ready quantities compiled from the plan, with a 10% allowance on cable and containment. Cable sizes come from the cable schedule CSV.

Import pages from PDF

Tap the pages to bring in as plans; each becomes a photo you can scale and mark up.

EV Site Planner

Mark chargers, cable routes and supply equipment on photos & site plans, then export clean, install-ready packs.
